---
title: "wow_data"
author: "Wenkai_Zhong"
date: "2025-06-17"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
#change R language to english
Sys.setlocale("LC_TIME", "English")
#rm(list = ls())

library(here)       
library(tidyverse)  
library(ncdf4) 

```

#import data function only import
```{r}
import_WOW_day <- function(date_string) {
 # Parse date
 parts <- strsplit(date_string, "-")[[1]]
 year <- parts[1]
 date_ymd <- paste0(parts[1], parts[2], parts[3])
 
 # Set path and format based on year
 if (year == "2021") {
   folder <- here("data", paste0("WOW_", year))
   files <- list.files(folder, pattern = paste0("WOW_NL_", date_ymd, "*.csv"), full.names = TRUE)
   
   # Read and merge CSV files
   all_data <- lapply(files, function(f) read.csv2(f, stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
   
   
 } else if (year %in% c("2022", "2023")) {
   library(jsonlite)
   folder <- here("data", paste0("WOW_", year), year)
   files <- list.files(folder, pattern = paste0("WOW_NL_", date_ymd, "*.json"), full.names = TRUE)
   
   # Read and merge JSON files
   all_data <- lapply(files, function(f) fromJSON(f)$Object)
   
 }
 
 # Combine all files
 if (length(all_data) > 0) {
   return(do.call(rbind, all_data))
 } else {
   return(NULL)
 }
}

# Usage
data_20210102 <- import_WOW_day("2021-01-02")
data_20220102 <- import_WOW_day("2022-01-02")

data_20210102
```
```{r}
unique_stations <- data_20210102 %>%
  select(Latitude, Longitude,Height) %>%
  mutate(
    Latitude = as.numeric(Latitude),
    Longitude = as.numeric(Longitude)
  )%>%
  distinct()

unique_stations
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(maps)

# 首先检查数据
# 首先检查异常值
cat("检查异常的纬度值（超出荷兰范围）:\n")
outliers <- unique_stations %>%
  filter(Latitude > 53.6 | Latitude < 50.7 | Longitude < 3.3 | Longitude > 7.3)
print(outliers)
cat("异常站点数量:", nrow(outliers), "\n\n")

# 方案1：过滤掉明显超出荷兰范围的站点
unique_stations_filtered <- unique_stations %>%
  filter(Latitude >= 50.5 & Latitude <= 53.6 & 
         Longitude >= 3.0 & Longitude <= 7.5)

cat("过滤后的站点数量:", nrow(unique_stations_filtered), "\n")
cat("过滤后纬度范围:", range(unique_stations_filtered$Latitude), "\n")
cat("过滤后经度范围:", range(unique_stations_filtered$Longitude), "\n\n")

# 重新创建地图（使用过滤后的数据）
netherlands_map <- map_data("world", region = "Netherlands")



# 方案1：创建两个子图比较
library(gridExtra)

# 荷兰本土站点
p1a <- ggplot(unique_stations_filtered, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Height), size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_color_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "green", high = "red",
                        midpoint = median(unique_stations_filtered$Height)) +
  theme_bw() +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1.3) +
  labs(title = paste("荷兰本土站点 (n=", nrow(unique_stations_filtered), ")", sep = ""))

# 异常站点
if(nrow(outliers) > 0) {
  p1b <- ggplot(outliers, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = Height), size = 4, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(Latitude, 2)), vjust = -1, size = 3) +
    scale_color_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "green", high = "red") +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(title = paste("异常位置站点 (n=", nrow(outliers), ")", sep = ""))
  
  grid.arrange(p1a, p1b, ncol = 2)
}

# 诊断信息
cat("\n诊断总结:\n")
cat("1. 原始数据包含", nrow(unique_stations), "个站点\n")
cat("2. 有", nrow(outliers), "个站点可能在荷兰地理范围之外\n")
cat("3. 荷兰本土范围内有", nrow(unique_stations_filtered), "个站点\n")
cat("4. 建议检查纬度>53.6的站点数据是否正确\n")
```
